title: Create a green cube button widget with counter (Flutter)

input.description:
# Task Metadata: task 3

## Task ID
task 3

## Action
Create a green cube button widget with counter (Flutter)

## Stack
Flutter

## Skip Flags
- Skip Designer: True
- Skip Developer: False
- Skip Tester: False

## Max QA Retries
3 (default)

## Pipeline
Architect → Developer → Tester (Designer skipped)

## Summary
Create `test/green_cube_button.dart` with `GreenCubeButton` StatefulWidget. 80×80 green square. Each tap increments an internal counter displayed as centered white text.

## Key Files
- **Create**: `test/green_cube_button.dart`
- **Reference**: `test/blue_cube_button.dart` (centered child), `test/red_cube_button.dart` (base pattern)

artifacts.implementation_plan:
# Implementation Plan: Green Cube Button Widget with Counter

## Task
Create a Flutter `GreenCubeButton` StatefulWidget in `test/green_cube_button.dart`.

## Reference
- `test/blue_cube_button.dart` — centered child pattern
- `test/red_cube_button.dart` — GestureDetector + Container base

## File to Create
`test/green_cube_button.dart`

## Requirements
- Widget class: `GreenCubeButton` (StatefulWidget)
- Dimensions: 80×80
- Appearance: solid green square (`Colors.green`)
- Internal counter start
